title: Reshaped Vanilla
description: Changes the textures of mobs and blocks, but still have the vanilla look. Also adds new variants of mobs!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23be19069e469aea1d54bed0f7cda2f4d12f7fb.jpeg)
# 
# What does this pack do? 
# 

  This resource pack aims to change some of the vanilla textures, but still have the vanilla look. I also add New mobs and 3d models.

# 
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30f49d11925460a3bad4d82ad6c1ad4896dc91c_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reshaped-vanilla)
[![PlanetMinecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adedc938342a8f3414b8dec22eaeb6a27725ad32.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/reshaped-vanilla)
[![Curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9775bb2356853555b1fdff43122d77a724cfde15_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reshaped-vanilla)

**1.2.1 Reshaped Vanilla Update / 1.2.2 Update**

<details>
<summary>1.2.1 Reshaped Vanilla update</summary>

![Birch Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52944efd15e40b2a1afa048d2dad6614ea70ff81.png)
The birch leaves model and texture are improved.
![Iron and Furnace golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93bcab342dfbd178004503dbc98b7c693ddda1b.png)
There are two iron golems. Randomly a furnace golem might spawn in place of a iron golem.
The furnace golem furnace and eyes are emissive.
![Cows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cd38007fc8e289e9328ff2c602e123cada98d4b.png)![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1564d9c6b14986c2ded6f0337c6a71afc609ab6b.png)![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a7bcc65b23280d24b346872f7a84c04a1a28b6b.png)
![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82f1a6e9033bba18e6922954a29b2b109251ccf7.png)
![beach1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa028d9448fda04e8860492af59a8c43e41b4ffd.png)![mushroom fields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a866aabe50e35edc7226b0f5af6fdcf0cf2a0ed.png)!
In the mushroom fields biome Villagers spawn with mushrooms.
[Pale Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08505fc14c9634dce3c4b226745ad16286cdc99.png)!
The Pale garden villager has yellow glowing eyes just like the creaking.
[Cherry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/766657a3943b56b28346882c7958114420f471e2.png)
First Cherry Variant of villager.
![Cherry2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acafc5921507e2aa0eae8fb1c41f551624410b51.png)
Second Cherry Variant of villager.
![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d557477d4b3256227990d569c27e46e9f4666cd8.png)
The end villager has emissive eyes.
![Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc85aa0b765c3612512e2ac58baca84d77ad1acf.png)![Soul sand valley/ Warped forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3cc9e3da13dd111a40f2c63b1d2316658b00330.png)
![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57914a3c832952a8f2d8d460618a6e3d921c4b7.png)
Ores are emissive.

These are all of the images.


</details>

# **Installation Guide:**

**Windows:**
1. Go to your files to %appdata% and then go to the /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Go to /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Put the resourcepack in the folder.

**Linux:**

1. Go to your files to your /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Then go to /resourcepacks/.
3. Put the resourcepack in the same folder.

**MacOS**

1. Go to ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks/ in your file manager.
2. Put the pack inside that folder.


#  

Thanks For Downloading!
